name: Cocoa-Nut Meringue Cheesecake2
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine coconut, pecans, and margarine; press onto bottom of 9-inch springform pan.
2. In a large bowl, combine cream cheese, sugar, cocoa, cold water, and vanilla extract. Mix until well blended.
3. Add egg yolks to the mixture and stir until combined.
4. Pour the batter over the crust in the prepared pan.
5. Bake at 350°F (175°C) for 30 minutes.
6. Loosen the edges of the cake from the rim of the pan, then cool before removing the rim of the pan.
7. In a separate bowl, beat egg whites and salt until foamy. Gradually add marshmallow creme, beating until stiff peaks form.
8. Sprinkle chopped pecans on top of the cheesecake, within 1/2 inch of the outer edge.
9. Carefully spread the marshmallow creme mixture over the top of the cheesecake to seal it.
10. Bake at 350°F (175°C) for an additional 15 minutes.
11. Cool completely before serving.
